title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today，the main contract closed 863，an increase of 2.62% throughout the day. some traders were active to sell,Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
